title: Execution Templates
description: Create reusable workflow templates that standardize agent execution patterns

sections.title: Execution Templates
sections.subtitle: Standardize workflows with reusable templates
sections.description: Templates define structured workflows that agents can follow consistently. They ensure reproducible results and simplify complex automation scenarios.

sections.title: Why Use Templates?
sections.content:
Execution templates provide:

• **Consistency**: Ensure agents follow the same process every time
• **Efficiency**: Reuse proven workflows across multiple agents
• **Quality Control**: Standardize outputs and reduce errors
• **Scalability**: Deploy complex workflows quickly and reliably
• **Collaboration**: Share best practices across teams

items.title: Step-by-Step Workflows
items.description: Define sequential steps that guide agents through complex processes with clear instructions

items.title: Dynamic Variables
items.description: Use placeholders and variables to customize template execution for different contexts and inputs

items.title: Conditional Logic
items.description: Add branching logic that allows agents to make decisions based on data and conditions

items.title: Function Integration
items.description: Seamlessly integrate custom functions into template workflows for extended capabilities

steps.title: Access Templates
steps.description: Navigate to the Templates section to view and create execution templates

steps.title: Create New Template
steps.description: Click 'New Template' to start building your workflow template
steps.details: You'll need to provide a name, description, and define the template structure

steps.title: Define Workflow Steps
steps.description: Add sequential steps that define what your agent should do at each stage
steps.details: Each step should have clear instructions, expected inputs, and desired outputs

steps.title: Add Variables & Logic
steps.description: Include dynamic variables and conditional logic to make your template flexible
steps.details: Use {{variable}} syntax for placeholders and conditional statements for branching

steps.title: Test Template
steps.description: Run test executions to validate your template works as expected

steps.title: Deploy to Agents
steps.description: Assign the template to your agents for consistent workflow execution

items.title: Customer Onboarding
items.description: Automated workflow for new customer setup and welcome process

items.title: Data Analysis Report
items.description: Generate comprehensive reports from data sources

items.title: Content Review & Approval
items.description: Streamlined content review and publishing workflow

sections.title: Template Structure
Advanced Features
items: **Function Calls**: Execute custom functions within steps

sections.title: Best Practices
tips: 📝 **Clear Instructions**: Write specific, actionable step instructions
🎯 **Single Purpose**: Design templates for specific, well-defined tasks
🔍 **Test Thoroughly**: Validate templates with various input scenarios
📊 **Version Control**: Maintain version history for template changes
🏷️ **Descriptive Names**: Use clear, descriptive names for templates and variables
🔄 **Iterative Improvement**: Regularly refine templates based on execution results

solutions: Check all variables are properly defined
Verify step instructions are clear and actionable
Add more specific instructions to steps
Use conditional logic to handle edge cases
Define clear success criteria for each step
Verify variables are defined in template
Test variable values in execution context
